visual_asset_briefs.purpose: Main lobby/home screen background displayed on TV/host screen
visual_asset_briefs.visual_style: Deep navy gradient with subtle Islamic geometric pattern overlay, warm amber vignette edges
visual_asset_briefs.composition: Center-weighted with negative space for UI elements, subtle radial light source from center-top
visual_asset_briefs.materials_textures: Subtle fabric/felt texture underneath, slight noise grain
visual_asset_briefs.cultural_references: Saudi Arabian majlis room ambiance, warm hospitality lighting
visual_asset_briefs.negative_constraints: No specific religious symbols, no real photographs, no Western cultural markers
visual_asset_briefs.prompt_for_image_model: Deep navy blue background with warm amber vignette lighting, subtle Islamic geometric pattern overlay at low opacity, elegant Saudi Arabian hospitality atmosphere, dark luxurious mood, party game platform aesthetic, clean negative space in center for UI overlay, digital art, 4K resolution
visual_asset_briefs.prompt_for_vector_model: Abstract geometric pattern border frame, Islamic tessellation, navy and gold color scheme, SVG
visual_asset_briefs.notes_for_designer: Must tile or stretch gracefully across all screen sizes. The geometric pattern should be at 5-8% opacity. Vignette should darken edges by 60%.
visual_asset_briefs.notes_for_implementation: Set as CSS background-image on .lobby-screen, use background-size: cover, preload with link rel=preload

visual_asset_briefs.negative_constraints: No copyrighted show logos, no real lightning photographs
visual_asset_briefs.prompt_for_image_model: Deep purple and dark blue gradient background, electric comedy show atmosphere, subtle lightning bolt shapes in corners at low opacity, bold dramatic lighting, party game background, halftone dot texture overlay, clean center for text overlay, digital art, 4K
visual_asset_briefs.prompt_for_vector_model: Abstract lightning bolt pattern, purple and cyan, SVG decorative border

visual_asset_briefs.composition: Full body character, facing viewer, slight 3/4 angle, transparent background

visual_asset_briefs.negative_constraints: No realistic falcon — must be stylized/cartoon. No offensive gestures. Sunglasses are signature element.
visual_asset_briefs.prompt_for_image_model: Stylized cartoon falcon character mascot wearing cool sunglasses and traditional Saudi ghutrah headwear, friendly confident welcoming pose, bold outlines, cel-shaded flat colors, gold and navy color scheme, game mascot style, transparent background, character design sheet
visual_asset_briefs.prompt_for_vector_model: Cartoon falcon mascot with sunglasses and ghutrah, bold clean vector style, Saudi game character, SVG
visual_asset_briefs.notes_for_designer: This is THE brand character. Must be instantly recognizable, work at small sizes (32px avatar), and feel uniquely Saudi. Think Duolingo owl energy but Saudi falcon cool.
visual_asset_briefs.notes_for_implementation: Used in lobby, loading screens, commentary popups, achievements. Need multiple expressions (happy, sad, excited, thinking) — start with neutral.

visual_asset_briefs.prompt_for_vector_model: Falcon mascot face expressions sprite sheet, 6 emotions, consistent vector style, SVG
visual_asset_briefs.notes_for_designer: 6 expressions needed: happy, shocked, thinking, sad, excited, angry. Eyebrows and mouth do the heavy lifting since eyes are behind sunglasses.
visual_asset_briefs.notes_for_implementation: Loaded as individual PNGs or CSS sprite sheet. Referenced by commentary.js for Abu Abed reactions.

music.emotional_target: Welcoming, exciting, anticipatory, fun gathering energy
music.instrumentation: Oud melodic hook, electronic beats, hand claps, subtle tabla, synth bass
music.sound_references_by_mood: Upbeat Middle Eastern electronic fusion, game show energy, party anticipation
music.layering_notes: Layer 1: electronic beat + bass. Layer 2: oud melody. Layer 3: percussion fills. Each layer can be toggled.
music.mix_notes: Warm, not too bright, leave headroom for SFX. Low-pass filter at 12kHz for non-fatiguing loop.
music.implementation_trigger: Plays on lobby screen load, fades out on game start
music.prompt_for_audio_tool: Upbeat Arabic electronic party game theme music, 120 BPM, oud melody hook, electronic beats, hand claps, tabla percussion, fun welcoming energy, seamless 90-second loop, game show atmosphere

music.scene: Quick Response game — all phases background
music.emotional_target: Bold, comedic, electric, late-night show energy
music.instrumentation: Funky bass, brass stabs, electric guitar riff, snare hits, synth lead
music.sound_references_by_mood: Late night comedy show band, funky game show, confident swagger
music.layering_notes: Full energy during voting, strip to bass+drums during writing phase
music.mix_notes: Punchy, forward mix. Bass and brass prominent.
music.implementation_trigger: Plays during Quick Response game, intensity varies by phase
music.prompt_for_audio_tool: Funky bold comedy game show theme, 130 BPM, brass stabs, electric bass, snare hits, confident late-night show energy, party game background music, seamless 60-second loop

music.emotional_target: Darkly comedic, suspenseful, haunted mansion, macabre fun
music.instrumentation: Harpsichord, strings pizzicato, theremin wobble, music box, timpani
music.sound_references_by_mood: Haunted mansion ride music, murder mystery dinner party, Gothic comedy
music.layering_notes: Base: strings + harpsichord. Add theremin during elimination phases. Music box for death sequences.
music.mix_notes: Dark, reverb-heavy, slight detuning for unsettling feel
music.prompt_for_audio_tool: Darkly comedic haunted mansion theme, 80 BPM, harpsichord, pizzicato strings, theremin, music box elements, Gothic comedy murder mystery atmosphere, seamless 90-second loop

music.scene: Winner announcement at end of any game
music.instrumentation: Full brass fanfare, orchestral hit, timpani roll, crash cymbal, crowd cheer
music.sound_references_by_mood: Olympic medal ceremony, game show jackpot, champion entrance
music.layering_notes: Timpani roll → brass fanfare → crash cymbal → crowd cheer layer
music.mix_notes: Big, wide, triumphant. Full frequency range.
music.implementation_trigger: Triggered on winner reveal, plays once
music.prompt_for_audio_tool: Triumphant victory fanfare, brass section, timpani roll, crash cymbal, crowd cheer, champion celebration, 8 seconds, game show winner moment, one-shot

music.scene: Last 10 seconds of any timed phase
music.instrumentation: Ticking clock, ascending synth, staccato strings, accelerating heartbeat
music.sound_references_by_mood: Game show final seconds, bomb timer, pressure cooker
music.layering_notes: Start with tick only, layer in ascending synth, add strings at 5s
music.mix_notes: Build from quiet to loud over duration
music.implementation_trigger: Triggered when timer reaches 10 seconds remaining
music.prompt_for_audio_tool: Urgent timer countdown tension music, ticking clock, ascending synth, accelerating tempo from 140 to 180 BPM, building pressure, 12 seconds, game show time running out

ui_sfx.prompt_for_audio_tool: Short satisfying UI button click sound, soft tactile pop, 100ms
ui_sfx.web_audio_synthesis: OscillatorNode: 800Hz sine, 50ms decay, slight pitch bend down. GainNode: 0.3 → 0 over 50ms.

ui_sfx.prompt_for_audio_tool: Vote lock-in confirmation sound, decisive click with subtle chime, 200ms
ui_sfx.web_audio_synthesis: Two OscillatorNodes: 600Hz + 900Hz sine, simultaneous, 100ms decay. Sounds like a 'ding-click'.

ui_sfx.scene: Each vote bar stacking during result reveal
ui_sfx.emotional_target: Building momentum, each one adds weight
ui_sfx.implementation_trigger: Each vote bar animation start, 200ms intervals
ui_sfx.prompt_for_audio_tool: Quick pop/tick for bar chart building, ascending pitch per successive call, 80ms
ui_sfx.web_audio_synthesis: OscillatorNode: starting 400Hz, increment +50Hz per call, triangle wave, 60ms decay.

ui_sfx.prompt_for_audio_tool: Explosive celebration sound, crowd cheer, air horn, confetti cannon, triumphant 2-second sting, party game jackpot moment
ui_sfx.web_audio_synthesis: White noise burst (200ms) → chord (C-E-G oscillators, 400ms) → decay. Layer with AudioBuffer crowd cheer if available.
OscillatorNode: 500Hz→700Hz sweep sine, 120ms. Subtle and satisfying.
OscillatorNode: 1000Hz square wave, 20ms. GainNode: 0.1 volume. Subtle.
OscillatorNode: 880Hz sine, two 30ms bursts with 30ms gap. GainNode: 0.4.

ui_sfx.prompt_for_audio_tool: Player join chime, ascending two-note welcome, bright and friendly, 300ms
ui_sfx.web_audio_synthesis: OscillatorNode: 523Hz→659Hz (C5→E5) sine, 150ms each. Rising welcome tone.

ui_sfx.prompt_for_audio_tool: Dramatic whoosh transition sound, screen wipe, 500ms, bold and energetic
ui_sfx.web_audio_synthesis: White noise with bandpass filter sweep 200Hz→2000Hz over 400ms. GainNode: 0.3→0.

ui_sfx.prompt_for_audio_tool: Correct answer bright chime, success ding, 300ms
ui_sfx.web_audio_synthesis: OscillatorNode: 880Hz sine, 200ms. Then 1320Hz, 100ms. Major interval = success.

ui_sfx.prompt_for_audio_tool: Wrong answer buzzer, game show fail sound, 400ms
ui_sfx.web_audio_synthesis: OscillatorNode: 150Hz sawtooth, 350ms. Dissonant and low = failure.

ui_sfx.implementation_trigger: Each frame of score counter animation
ui_sfx.prompt_for_audio_tool: Quick score tick, coin-like, 30ms per tick, ascending subtle
ui_sfx.web_audio_synthesis: OscillatorNode: 1200Hz sine, 15ms. GainNode: 0.05. Very subtle per-tick.

ambience.prompt_for_audio_tool: Warm indoor gathering ambience, soft crowd murmur, occasional laugh, comfortable room atmosphere, seamless 60-second loop, subtle background
ambience.notes: Very low volume, sits under music. Creates sense of people being together.

ambience.emotional_target: Creaky haunted fort, wind, distant owl
ambience.implementation_trigger: Murder Party game active, underlays music
ambience.prompt_for_audio_tool: Haunted fort ambience, creaking wood, distant wind, occasional owl hoot, dripping water, eerie atmospheric loop, 90 seconds, subtle horror
ambience.notes: Must loop seamlessly. Very low mix — atmosphere only.

ambience.prompt_for_audio_tool: Courtroom ambience, soft gallery murmur, paper shuffling, occasional gavel tap in distance, formal judicial atmosphere, 60-second seamless loop

voiceover.emotional_target: Witty, warm, Saudi humor, encouraging with playful teasing
voiceover.voice_character: Male Saudi Arabic, 30s, confident, funny uncle energy, Najdi dialect preferred
voiceover.implementation_trigger: Various game events trigger specific commentary lines
voiceover.prompt_for_voice_tool: Saudi Arabic male voice, warm and witty game show host, Najdi dialect, confident and playful, age 30s, recording individual commentary lines for a party game
voiceover.notes: Each line is 2-5 seconds. Need consistent voice across all recordings. commentary.js has all the text. Prioritize the 50 most common lines first.

mvp_architecture.database: None (all state in memory, rooms auto-cleanup after 2 hours)
mvp_architecture.cdn: Render's built-in CDN for static files
mvp_architecture.limits: ~50 concurrent users, cold starts on free tier, rooms lost on restart

scale_architecture.stack: Node.js 18 + Express + Socket.IO with Redis adapter
scale_architecture.database: Redis for session/room state persistence across instances
scale_architecture.cdn: Cloudflare (free tier) for static assets + DDoS protection
scale_architecture.monitoring: Sentry for errors, UptimeRobot for availability
scale_architecture.limits: ~500 concurrent users, room state survives restarts

cost_sensitive_architecture.compute: Single VPS (Hetzner €4/month or Oracle Cloud free tier)
cost_sensitive_architecture.stack: Node.js + PM2 process manager + Nginx reverse proxy
cost_sensitive_architecture.database: SQLite for persistent data, in-memory for room state
cost_sensitive_architecture.monitoring: PM2 built-in monitoring + custom health endpoint
cost_sensitive_architecture.limits: ~200 concurrent users, full control, manual maintenance

deployment_checklist: 3. Enable WebSocket support in hosting provider settings
4. Configure health check endpoint at GET /health
6. Configure static asset cache headers (1 month for CSS/JS with hash)
8. Set up basic rate limiting (100 req/min per IP)
9. Configure CORS to allow only your domain
10. Set Socket.IO pingTimeout and pingInterval for mobile connections
11. Add room cleanup cron (clear rooms older than 2 hours)
12. Test with 8 simultaneous players before launch

legal_redesigns.risk: Copyright infringement, DMCA, reverse engineering proprietary software
legal_redesigns.safe_alternative: All assets created originally. Visual identity based on Saudi cultural elements (falcon, dallah, Al Sadu, geometric patterns). Unique art direction in DESIGN_BIBLE.md.
Original mascot Abu Abed — a cartoon falcon with sunglasses and ghutrah. Unique Saudi personality. No visual similarity to any Jackbox character.
17 original Arabic game names. Genre descriptions are fair use (party game, trivia, drawing game) but specific names (Quiplash, Fibbage) never appear in user-facing product.
Original game mechanics that serve the same genre function. Scoring values, timing, matchup algorithms designed independently. Socket.IO protocol is original implementation.

legal_redesigns.original_request_type: Use Jackbox in marketing or claim compatibility
legal_redesigns.safe_alternative: Market as 'Saudi party game platform' or 'Arabic multiplayer game night'. Never reference Jackbox in product materials. Genre comparison in press/reviews is fair use but not in product copy.
